title: Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-PT-50M - UISP power TransPort cable, 50m
category: Ubiquiti / Powering / Power cables and adapters / DC cables
description: Power two-core outdoor DC cable from Ubiquiti from the UISP TransPort series of cables with special Power TransPort connectors on both sides and 50m long . The cable is very robust, contains 2 wires with a cross-section of AWG 12, and its white sheath is made of thermoplastic elastomer
